files.content:
CareLync
Benefits Features Pricing Help
Benefits Features Pricing Help
Care Coordination

Coordinate
Patient Care

Connect all providers involved in patient care. Real-time communication, shared notes, and care plans. Better outcomes, faster recovery.

1K+

Healthcare Teams

500K+

Patients Coordinated

Why Care Coordination Matters

Better Outcomes

Coordinated care reduces hospital readmissions by 23%. Patients recover faster.

Save Time

Eliminate phone calls and emails. All communication in one secure platform.

Reduce Costs

Better coordination means fewer duplicated tests and unnecessary procedures.

HIPAA Secure

Enterprise-grade security. All communication encrypted and auditable.

Team Collaboration

Doctors, nurses, specialists, and care managers on one unified platform.

Track Progress

Real-time dashboards show patient progress. Adjust treatment plans instantly.

Key Features

Secure Messaging

HIPAA-compliant messaging between all care team members. Real-time notifications.

  • Instant message delivery
  • File sharing
  • Message history

Care Plans

Collaborative care planning. Everyone stays on the same page.

  • Shared goals
  • Task assignment
  • Progress tracking

Simple Pricing

Per provider per month

Standard

$29/provider/mo

  • Messaging
  • Care plans
  • Mobile app
POPULAR

Professional

$49/provider/mo

  • All Standard +
  • Analytics
  • Priority support

Questions?

Yes, 100% HIPAA compliant with end-to-end encryption, secure data centers, and complete audit trails.
Most teams go live in 1-2 weeks. No complex setup needed. Invite providers and start immediately.
24/7 support available. Live chat, email, and phone support. Average response time: 5 minutes.

Connect Your Care Team

30-day free trial. No credit card required.
